info.title: Spotify Playback Control
info.description: Lets the OpenNex assistant search for and control music playback on the user's Spotify account.

get.summary: Search Spotify for a track, album, artist, or playlist by name.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: The search query, e.g. the song or playlist name.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of item to search for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Max number of results to return.

put.summary: Start or resume playback of a specific track, album, or playlist (or resume whatever was last playing if no body is given).

context_uri.description: Spotify URI of the album/playlist/artist to play, e.g. 'spotify:playlist:37i9dQZF1DXcBWIGoYBM5M'.

uris.description: List of Spotify track URIs to play, e.g. ['spotify:track:4uLU6hMCjMI75M1A2tKUQC'].

put.summary: Pause playback on the user's active Spotify device.

post.summary: Skip to the next track in the user's queue.
Skip to the previous track in the user's queue.

get.summary: Get the track currently being played on the user's Spotify account.
